target: 5. Like an Idol
Phew…
(Seems a bit calmer…)
Shinpei, you okay to come in?
Yeah, it's fine.

Already ready?
You're quick.

I'm in the swimming club.
I'm used to changing clothes.
Do you have enough towels?
Yeah, there were some left in the storage.
Towels that've been left for two years… won't they smell?
Heh… well, just a little.
You're fine, I put a towel and dry clothes in the changing room…
Once Kaori finishes her shower, we can leave right away.
Yeah, that's right.

By the way… I kind of forced you to come here, but
did Kaori find it annoying?
Please come to my place!
Huh?
If you go to the inn like this, soaked…
U-uh, it's okay. I'll dry on the way.

It was my fault for falling off my bike!
Please, let me take you for a shower!
But today's your sister's…
Ah… you heard, huh?

It's fine. If I let you go home alone,
you'd definitely get scolded by your sister.
Ah…

Either way, I and Shinpei need to go home first,
so how about you come with us?
Yeah… I'll take you up on that.
Then let's hurry, Kaori.

Oh, Mio.
You can call me Kaori.
Uh… Kaori-chan?
Calling her "chan" all of a sudden is rude.
S-sure, that's right.

No, it's okay.
It's easier to talk like that, and it feels nice.
Then call me Mio-chan too.
Mio-chan… yeah, I got it.

Well, it's fine.
She said she was grateful too.
She refused at first, but I think it was just being polite.
…Well, that's fine then.

Even though it's been a while since we met,
you seem to understand Kaori pretty well.
Huh… what?

Huh?
Nothing at all.

(Still, helping Mio ended up having me helped…
I feel bad about that.)
(But maybe it's good that I got to spend time with Kaori.)
(When I told her not to walk around alone at night…)
(But I guess I could have learned more about why she was alone…)

Shinpei, what are you thinking?
About Kaori?
Huh? How did you know?
Wow, you're sneaky.
What? Why?

Because Kaori was taking a shower right now!
What were you imagining?
I wasn't thinking that at all!

You don't think you two were already close
since you came back from Tokyo together?
What do you mean?

I mean, you two weren't just reuniting now,
but had already been close since before you went to Tokyo…

Why does it have to be like that?!
We just happened to be on the same boat!
Then why did Kaori know you couldn't swim?
Huh…?

After you fell into the sea,
Kaori said…
"I thought Ajiro could swim now."
Now that you mention it, she did say that…

A kid we only knew from elementary school
wouldn't remember if someone could swim or not.
Well… that's true…
See! You two know each other!
It's a misunderstanding!

But there's something weird about it.
You two were supposed to be reuniting after a long time,
but you didn't seem nostalgic at all.

(Well… I already met her once before…
so that's why…)
Plus that face… I feel like I've seen it somewhere…
Huh?
Mio~! Thanks for the shower!
Huh? Mio?
Over here!

Oh, there you are.
And Ajiro too.
Ah…
(Huh…)
(Kaori… I felt this way when we first met too.)

Maybe because she just finished getting ready?
She looks even more beautiful…

Oh! Right!
Are your clothes okay?
I hope they dried properly.

Yeah, they're fine.
Thanks for the towel and hairdryer.
I feel refreshed~

That's good.
I'm relieved.

Hey, Shinpei!
Why are you blushing?!
No, you're the one who's blushing!

I-I mean… when I look at you again,
you're really cute…
Like an idol…
…An idol?

W-what's wrong, Mio?
Is there something on my face?
Ah! Oh no!!!
Huh?!

What's wrong with you, Mio?
Why did you shout like that?
S-stop! Wait a second!!!
(What's with her…?)
W-what's going on?

I don't know.
She went to her room, I think.
Well, she'll be back soon, so take your time.
Ah, um… is this Ajiro's room?
Yeah.
U-uh! Uhh!

W-what's wrong?
Why are you so tense?
N-nothing…

You don't look like nothing…
Your face is red too.
Maybe you caught a cold?
A-ah, no! That's not it!

S-since I found out this was Ajiro's room,
I got all nervous.
Don't worry about it.
Most of my stuff's in Tokyo, so it's basically an empty room.

N-no, I don't think so…
I think it's clean.
Why?
You can see it's clean, right?

I'm sure someone who cares about this place
has been taking care of it all along.
I see…

Ah, sorry.
I was staring.
(Oh… this feeling, maybe it's a bit like the past…)
(But even if I remember her face, I don't remember playing with her…)

(Since I've never been here before, maybe Ushio and I
weren't close enough to visit each other's homes…)

Oh, right.
Thanks for helping me earlier.

U-uh, don't worry about it.
I just reacted on instinct.

Aren't you the same, Ajiro?
You saved Mio even though you couldn't swim.
I can't swim…
Huh…?

That's what I wanted to say…
You remembered I couldn't swim?
Ah… that's…

Do you remember?
Back then, when Shinpei was reading about the underwater ruins,
we talked about whether there might be something here on Hitogashima Island…

When I said, "What if I go look for it?", 
Shinpei said, "I can't swim, so it's impossible."

I said something thoughtless without knowing Shinpei couldn't swim…
I really regretted it later.
"I don't remember…"
"Thinking about it, though…"

So that happened?
I don't remember…
Oh… right.

But I don't think it was a thoughtless comment at all.
If I don't remember, it probably didn't even bother me back then.

Thank you.
I feel a bit relieved.
Thinking about it, though…
…Did you remember?

Yeah… that's right!
Then I said, "If you're going, maybe a submarine?"
Eh…?

Wait, was that wrong?
I thought I said that.
S-so that's how it was…?

Probably, at that time,
I was only thinking about how I said something thoughtless…
Ah, that's why I didn't remember.
U-uh… maybe.

I didn't even care that much back then.
I never thought about being called thoughtless,
then or now.

S-so… that's how it is…
You're still so kind.
(Oh, I see, that's what it was about.)
(But why did Mio get the wrong idea…?)

I finally found it!
This one, this one!

A magazine?
What's so special about that?
Ah… wait, Mio!
This one! Look, Kaori!
Eh…?
Ah…
Eh!?
W-why is Kaori on the cover of this magazine!?

Is this you, Kaori?
You look just like her, don't you!?
Eh… um…
Yes, it's definitely me.
<color=#GF_TIPS_122>Of course it's the idol Kaori Koyuba!</color> I've been thinking I've seen her before!
S-she's an idol!?

What's with you, Shin?
You didn't even recognize her?
You couldn't tell either, could you?
I don't know much about idols.
I'm the same.

Ah…!
Maybe I should've pretended not to know?
No, I'm actually happy you noticed.

But… if I talk about my job,
there'll be a bunch of things I need to explain…
Plus, I need to keep my presence here a secret.
(Oh right, Kaori said the town hall arranged her accommodation)
So you came back to the island because of your idol work?
Yeah, something like that.

You shouldn't have asked, Shin.
There's a confidentiality obligation, you know.
Where did you even learn that word?

Hey, Kaori.
Can you do something idol-like for me?
Eh!?! Something idol-like!?
You really go all in, don't you…
After all, it's not every day I get to talk to an idol.
Eh, um…
Kaori, you don't have to go through all this for her.
No, it's okay. I'll do my best!
(This is professionalism, huh…)

…Hmm.
Then, I'll do it.

Your heart is ringing, ringing.
This is Kaori Koyuba, the "Kao Rin."

This time, I came here for a secret solo performance
at the Hitogashima Island summer festival!
…That's how it is.

Wah~! This is the real deal idol!
Hey, Shin?
O-oh… right.
Uu… I'm so embarrassed.
